2.0.1.0.added:
Set Axis From Input
Set Joystick From Input
IsDown expression

2.0.1.1.fixed: Set Axis and Set Joystick from Inputs now correctly read the inputs only from the control scheme they are writing to

2.0.1.2.fixed: Should now work on old versions of C3 where SetRuntimeModuleMainScript and SetC3RuntimeScripts weren't supported

2.0.1.4.added: Autocomplete IDs for input names, control schemes, axis names and joystick names
